subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! At all times art thou remembered, and in the celestial gathering thou art ever-present, even in the darkest nights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در جمیع اوقات در خاطری و در محفل رحمانی حاضر و در شبان تیره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @consolation and comfort
